{{Quote|The Tipsy Mynock welcomes the Karfeddion Skull Crackers.|Holobanner on display in The Tipsy Mynock cantina in 32 BBY|<ref name="CoD" />}}
The '''Skull Crackers''' were a [[Smashball/Legends|smashball]] team from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]] known for their disregard of the rules of play. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the Skull Crackers attended [[The Tipsy Mynock]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] and became [[Alcohol/Legends|inebriated]].

==Description==
The Skull Crackers were a team based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]] that participated in the sport [[Smashball/Legends|smashball]]. They were known throughout the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]] for disregarding both the rules of the game and the lives of opposing players, but were considered local heroes on Karfeddion.<ref name="CoD" />

==History==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'', which includes the Skull Crackers' visit to [[The Tipsy Mynock]], in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> the members of the Skull Crackers attended [[The Tipsy Mynock]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on Karfeddion, which had a holobanner welcoming them put on display. A dozen members of the team gathered in a corner of the cantina and drank [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverages, raising their flagons at each other and passers by. They became more inebriated with each [[Standard minute/Legends|minute]] and were ready to cause trouble.<ref name="CoD" />

At the same [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Arwen Cohl]] and his associate [[Boiny]] had a meeting in The Tipsy Mynock with the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lope (individual)|Lope]], who could have been mistaken for a Skull Cracker had he been several [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeters]] shorter and less dangerous in appearance. The meeting was interrupted by the arrival of a group of four Humans whom Cohl assumed were Skull Crackers, but they were actually a group led by the individual [[Pezzle]], who planned to collect [[Currency/Legends|money]] owed to them by Lope.<ref name="CoD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Skull Crackers appeared in ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'', a [[2001]] novel by [[James Luceno]].<ref name="CoD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Cloak of Deception (abridged audiobook)|''Cloak of Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
